revision.text:
{{神社 |名称 = 小梳神社 |画像 = [[File:小梳神社 - panoramio.jpg|250px]]
鳥居と拝殿 |所在地 = [[静岡県]][[静岡市]][[葵区]]紺屋町7-13 |位置 = {{coord|34|58|24.8|N|138|23|10.8|E|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = [[建速須佐之男命]]、[[奇稲田姫命]] |神体 = |社格 = [[式内社]]、旧[[県社]] |創建 = |宮司 = |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = 7月27日 |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shizuoka|label=小梳神社|coordinates= {{coord2|34|58|24.8|N|138|23|10.8|E}}|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=12|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|coord={{coord|34|58|24.8|N|138|23|10.8|E}}}} }} '''小梳神社'''（おぐしじんじゃ）は、[[静岡県]][[静岡市]][[葵区]]紺屋町（こうやまち）にある神社[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4406004 小梳神社] - 静岡県神社庁。 == 概要 == JR[[静岡駅]]北口の北西至近、呉服町通り沿いの北側に鎮座している。 創建は不詳だが、同名の[[式内社]]に比定されている古社である[https://humizuki.com/omaturi_zanmai/sight/jinja/sizuoka/ogusi.htm 小梳神社] - お祭り三昧[https://genbu.net/data/suruga/ogusi_title.htm 小梳神社] - 玄松子。 少将井宮（しょうしょういのみや）とも呼ばれ、[[今川家]]にも崇敬された[https://www.visit-shizuoka.com/t/oogosho400/study/07_05.htm 紺屋町と少将井社〔小梳神社〕と代官屋敷] - するが企画観光局。 幼少期の[[徳川家康]]（竹千代）が武運長久を祈願した神社としても知られ、かつては[[駿府城]]三ノ丸の城代屋敷（現・静岡市歴史博物館、旧・青葉小学校）に鎮座していたが、江戸時代の駿府城拡張に伴って、新谷町（現・御幸町〜伝馬町）を経た後、現在地（紺屋町）に遷座された[https://www.visit-shizuoka.com/spots/detail.php?kanko=543#:~:text=%E5%BE%B3%E5%B7%9D%E5%AE%B6%E5%BA%B7%E3%81%AE%E5%B9%BC%E5%B0%91%E6%9C%9F,%E5%BA%87%E8%AD%B7%E3%82%92%E5%8F%97%E3%81%91%E3%81%BE%E3%81%97%E3%81%9F%25E3%2580%2582 小梳神社] - するが企画観光局[http://www.ieyasu-net.com/shiseki/shizuoka/07shizuokashi/0002.html 小梳神社] - 全国家康公ネットワーク。 [[明治]]40年（[[1907年]]）に[[県社]]に列格。 == 祭神 == * [[建速須佐之男命]] * [[奇稲田姫命]] == 脚注 == {{Reflist}} == 外部リンク == * [http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4406004 小梳神社] - 静岡県神社庁 {{DEFAULTSORT:おくししんしや}} [[Category:静岡県の旧県社]] [[Category:駿河区の建築物]] [[Category:駿河区の歴史]] [[Category:駿河国の式内社]] [[Category:祇園神社]]

{{神社 |名称 = 小梳神社 |画像 = [[File:小梳神社 - panoramio.jpg|250px]]
鳥居と拝殿 |所在地 = [[静岡県]][[静岡市]][[葵区]]紺屋町7-13 |位置 = {{coord|34|58|24.8|N|138|23|10.8|E|region:JP-22_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = [[建速須佐之男命]]、[[奇稲田姫命]] |神体 = |社格 = [[式内社]]、旧[[県社]] |創建 = |宮司 = |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = 7月27日 |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shizuoka|label=小梳神社|coordinates= {{coord2|34|58|24.8|N|138|23|10.8|E}}|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=12|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|coord={{coord|34|58|24.8|N|138|23|10.8|E}}}} }} '''小梳神社'''（おぐしじんじゃ）は、[[静岡県]][[静岡市]][[葵区]]紺屋町（こうやまち）にある神社[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4406004 小梳神社] - 静岡県神社庁。 == 概要 == JR[[静岡駅]]北口の北西至近、呉服町通り沿いの北側に鎮座している。 創建は不詳だが、同名の[[式内社]]に比定されている古社である[https://humizuki.com/omaturi_zanmai/sight/jinja/sizuoka/ogusi.htm 小梳神社] - お祭り三昧[https://genbu.net/data/suruga/ogusi_title.htm 小梳神社] - 玄松子。 少将井宮（しょうしょういのみや）とも呼ばれ、[[今川家]]にも崇敬された[https://www.visit-shizuoka.com/t/oogosho400/study/07_05.htm 紺屋町と少将井社〔小梳神社〕と代官屋敷] - するが企画観光局。 幼少期の[[徳川家康]]（竹千代）が武運長久を祈願した神社としても知られ、かつては[[駿府城]]三ノ丸の城代屋敷（現・静岡市歴史博物館、旧・青葉小学校）に鎮座していたが、江戸時代の駿府城拡張に伴って、新谷町（現・御幸町〜伝馬町）を経た後、現在地（紺屋町）に遷座された[https://www.visit-shizuoka.com/spots/detail.php?kanko=543#:~:text=%E5%BE%B3%E5%B7%9D%E5%AE%B6%E5%BA%B7%E3%81%AE%E5%B9%BC%E5%B0%91%E6%9C%9F,%E5%BA%87%E8%AD%B7%E3%82%92%E5%8F%97%E3%81%91%E3%81%BE%E3%81%97%E3%81%9F%25E3%2580%2582 小梳神社] - するが企画観光局[http://www.ieyasu-net.com/shiseki/shizuoka/07shizuokashi/0002.html 小梳神社] - 全国家康公ネットワーク。 [[明治]]40年（[[1907年]]）に[[県社]]に列格。 == 祭神 == * [[建速須佐之男命]] * [[奇稲田姫命]] == 脚注 == {{Reflist}} == 外部リンク == * [http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4406004 小梳神社] - 静岡県神社庁 {{DEFAULTSORT:おくししんしや}} [[Category:静岡県の旧県社]] [[Category:駿河区の建築物]] [[Category:駿河区の歴史]] [[Category:駿河国の式内社]] [[Category:祇園神社]]

{{nihongo|'''Ogushi Shrine'''|小梳神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Suruga Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Ogushi Shrine'''|小梳神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Suruga Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Ogushi Shrine'''|小梳神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Suruga Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Ogushi Shrine'''|小梳神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Suruga Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Ogushi Shrine'''|小梳神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Suruga Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Ogushi Shrine'''|小梳神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Suruga Province]].

revision.text:
{{神社 |名称 = 小梳神社 |画像 = [[File:小梳神社 - panoramio.jpg|250px]]
鳥居と拝殿 |所在地 = [[静岡県]][[静岡市]][[葵区]]紺屋町7-13 |位置 = {{coord|34|58|24.8|N|138|23|10.8|E|region:JP-22_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = [[建速須佐之男命]]、[[奇稲田姫命]] |神体 = |社格 = [[式内社]]、旧[[県社]] |創建 = |宮司 = |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = 7月27日 |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shizuoka|label=小梳神社|coordinates= {{coord2|34|58|24.8|N|138|23|10.8|E}}|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=12|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|coord={{coord|34|58|24.8|N|138|23|10.8|E}}}} }} '''小梳神社'''（おぐしじんじゃ）は、[[静岡県]][[静岡市]][[葵区]]紺屋町（こうやまち）にある神社[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4406004 小梳神社] - 静岡県神社庁。 == 概要 == JR[[静岡駅]]北口の北西至近、呉服町通り沿いの北側に鎮座している。 創建は不詳だが、同名の[[式内社]]に比定されている古社である[https://humizuki.com/omaturi_zanmai/sight/jinja/sizuoka/ogusi.htm 小梳神社] - お祭り三昧[https://genbu.net/data/suruga/ogusi_title.htm 小梳神社] - 玄松子。 少将井宮（しょうしょういのみや）とも呼ばれ、[[今川家]]にも崇敬された[https://www.visit-shizuoka.com/t/oogosho400/study/07_05.htm 紺屋町と少将井社〔小梳神社〕と代官屋敷] - するが企画観光局。 幼少期の[[徳川家康]]（竹千代）が武運長久を祈願した神社としても知られ、かつては[[駿府城]]三ノ丸の城代屋敷（現・静岡市歴史博物館、旧・青葉小学校）に鎮座していたが、江戸時代の駿府城拡張に伴って、新谷町（現・御幸町〜伝馬町）を経た後、現在地（紺屋町）に遷座された[https://www.visit-shizuoka.com/spots/detail.php?kanko=543#:~:text=%E5%BE%B3%E5%B7%9D%E5%AE%B6%E5%BA%B7%E3%81%AE%E5%B9%BC%E5%B0%91%E6%9C%9F,%E5%BA%87%E8%AD%B7%E3%82%92%E5%8F%97%E3%81%91%E3%81%BE%E3%81%97%E3%81%9F%25E3%2580%2582 小梳神社] - するが企画観光局[http://www.ieyasu-net.com/shiseki/shizuoka/07shizuokashi/0002.html 小梳神社] - 全国家康公ネットワーク。 [[明治]]40年（[[1907年]]）に[[県社]]に列格。 == 祭神 == * [[建速須佐之男命]] * [[奇稲田姫命]] == 脚注 == {{Reflist}} == 外部リンク == * [http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4406004 小梳神社] - 静岡県神社庁 {{DEFAULTSORT:おくししんしや}} [[Category:静岡県の旧県社]] [[Category:駿河区の建築物]] [[Category:駿河区の歴史]] [[Category:駿河国の式内社]] [[Category:祇園神社]]

鳥居と拝殿 |所在地 = [[静岡県]][[静岡市]][[葵区]]紺屋町7-13 |位置 = {{coord|34|58|24.8|N|138|23|10.8|E|region:JP-22_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = [[建速須佐之男命]]、[[奇稲田姫命]] |神体 = |社格 = [[式内社]]、旧[[県社]] |創建 = |宮司 = |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = 7月27日 |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shizuoka|label=小梳神社|coordinates= {{coord2|34|58|24.8|N|138|23|10.8|E}}|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=12|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|coord={{coord|34|58|24.8|N|138|23|10.8|E}}}} }} '''小梳神社'''（おぐしじんじゃ）は、[[静岡県]][[静岡市]][[葵区]]紺屋町（こうやまち）にある神社[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4406004 小梳神社] - 静岡県神社庁。 == 概要 == JR[[静岡駅]]北口の北西至近、呉服町通り沿いの北側に鎮座している。 創建は不詳だが、同名の[[式内社]]に比定されている古社である[https://humizuki.com/omaturi_zanmai/sight/jinja/sizuoka/ogusi.htm 小梳神社] - お祭り三昧[https://genbu.net/data/suruga/ogusi_title.htm 小梳神社] - 玄松子。 少将井宮（しょうしょういのみや）とも呼ばれ、[[今川家]]にも崇敬された[https://www.visit-shizuoka.com/t/oogosho400/study/07_05.htm 紺屋町と少将井社〔小梳神社〕と代官屋敷] - するが企画観光局。 幼少期の[[徳川家康]]（竹千代）が武運長久を祈願した神社としても知られ、かつては[[駿府城]]三ノ丸の城代屋敷（現・静岡市歴史博物館、旧・青葉小学校）に鎮座していたが、江戸時代の駿府城拡張に伴って、新谷町（現・御幸町〜伝馬町）を経た後、現在地（紺屋町）に遷座された[https://www.visit-shizuoka.com/spots/detail.php?kanko=543#:~:text=%E5%BE%B3%E5%B7%9D%E5%AE%B6%E5%BA%B7%E3%81%AE%E5%B9%BC%E5%B0%91%E6%9C%9F,%E5%BA%87%E8%AD%B7%E3%82%92%E5%8F%97%E3%81%91%E3%81%BE%E3%81%97%E3%81%9F%25E3%2580%2582 小梳神社] - するが企画観光局[http://www.ieyasu-net.com/shiseki/shizuoka/07shizuokashi/0002.html 小梳神社] - 全国家康公ネットワーク。 [[明治]]40年（[[1907年]]）に[[県社]]に列格。 == 祭神 == * [[建速須佐之男命]] * [[奇稲田姫命]] == 脚注 == {{Reflist}} == 外部リンク == * [http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4406004 小梳神社] - 静岡県神社庁 [[Category:静岡県の旧県社]] [[Category:駿河区の建築物]] [[Category:駿河区の歴史]] [[Category:駿河国の式内社]] [[Category:祇園神社]] ==End Japanese==

[[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinai Hiteisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Suruga Province]] [[JA:小梳神社]] {{wikidata link|Q134930718}} [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] {{translated page|ja|小梳神社|version=103599838|comment=Imported full ja history}}[[Category:Automerged Japanese text]] == Japanese Wikipedia content == {{神社 |名称 = 小梳神社 |画像 = [[File:小梳神社 - panoramio.jpg|250px]]
鳥居と拝殿 |所在地 = {{jalink|静岡県|Q131320}}{{jalink|静岡市|Q174691}}{{jalink|葵区|Q1131483}}紺屋町7-13 |位置 = {{coord|34|58|24.8|N|138|23|10.8|E|region:JP-22_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{jalink|建速須佐之男命}}、{{jalink|奇稲田姫命}} |神体 = |社格 = {{jalink|式内社}}、旧{{jalink|県社}} |創建 = |宮司 = |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = 7月27日 |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shizuoka|label=小梳神社|coordinates= {{coord2|34|58|24.8|N|138|23|10.8|E}}|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=12|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|coord={{coord|34|58|24.8|N|138|23|10.8|E}}}} }} '''小梳神社'''（おぐしじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|静岡県|Q131320}}{{jalink|静岡市|Q174691}}{{jalink|葵区|Q1131483}}紺屋町（こうやまち）にある神社[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4406004 小梳神社] - 静岡県神社庁。 == 概要 == JR{{jalink|静岡駅|Q801440}}北口の北西至近、呉服町通り沿いの北側に鎮座している。 創建は不詳だが、同名の{{jalink|式内社}}に比定されている古社である[https://humizuki.com/omaturi_zanmai/sight/jinja/sizuoka/ogusi.htm 小梳神社] - お祭り三昧[https://genbu.net/data/suruga/ogusi_title.htm 小梳神社] - 玄松子。 少将井宮（しょうしょういのみや）とも呼ばれ、{{jalink|今川家}}にも崇敬された[https://www.visit-shizuoka.com/t/oogosho400/study/07_05.htm 紺屋町と少将井社〔小梳神社〕と代官屋敷] - するが企画観光局。 幼少期の{{jalink|徳川家康|Q171977}}（竹千代）が武運長久を祈願した神社としても知られ、かつては{{jalink|駿府城|Q1038629}}三ノ丸の城代屋敷（現・静岡市歴史博物館、旧・青葉小学校）に鎮座していたが、江戸時代の駿府城拡張に伴って、新谷町（現・御幸町〜伝馬町）を経た後、現在地（紺屋町）に遷座された[https://www.visit-shizuoka.com/spots/detail.php?kanko=543#:~:text=%E5%BE%B3%E5%B7%9D%E5%AE%B6%E5%BA%B7%E3%81%AE%E5%B9%BC%E5%B0%91%E6%9C%9F,%E5%BA%87%E8%AD%B7%E3%82%92%E5%8F%97%E3%81%91%E3%81%BE%E3%81%97%E3%81%9F%25E3%2580%2582 小梳神社] - するが企画観光局[http://www.ieyasu-net.com/shiseki/shizuoka/07shizuokashi/0002.html 小梳神社] - 全国家康公ネットワーク。 {{jalink|明治|Q3125096}}40年（{{jalink|1907年|Q2048}}）に{{jalink|県社}}に列格。 == 祭神 == * {{jalink|建速須佐之男命}} * {{jalink|奇稲田姫命}} == 脚注 == {{Reflist}} == 外部リンク == * [http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4406004 小梳神社] - 静岡県神社庁 ==End Japanese== [[Category:静岡県の旧県社]] [[Category:駿河区の建築物]] [[Category:駿河区の歴史]] [[Category:駿河国の式内社]] [[Category:祇園神社]]

street address (P6375) == * {'text': '静岡県静岡市葵区紺屋町', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:小梳神社]] {{wikidata link|Q134930718}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = 小梳神社 |画像 = [[File:小梳神社 - panoramio.jpg|250px]]
鳥居と拝殿 |所在地 = {{jalink|静岡県|Q131320}}{{jalink|静岡市|Q174691}}{{jalink|葵区|Q1131483}}紺屋町7-13 |位置 = {{coord|34|58|24.8|N|138|23|10.8|E|region:JP-22_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{jalink|建速須佐之男命}}、{{jalink|奇稲田姫命}} |神体 = |社格 = {{jalink|式内社}}、旧{{jalink|県社}} |創建 = |宮司 = |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = 7月27日 |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shizuoka|label=小梳神社|coordinates= {{coord2|34|58|24.8|N|138|23|10.8|E}}|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=12|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|coord={{coord|34|58|24.8|N|138|23|10.8|E}}}} }} '''小梳神社'''（おぐしじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|静岡県|Q131320}}{{jalink|静岡市|Q174691}}{{jalink|葵区|Q1131483}}紺屋町（こうやまち）にある神社[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4406004 小梳神社] - 静岡県神社庁。 === 概要 === JR{{jalink|静岡駅|Q801440}}北口の北西至近、呉服町通り沿いの北側に鎮座している。 創建は不詳だが、同名の{{jalink|式内社}}に比定されている古社である[https://humizuki.com/omaturi_zanmai/sight/jinja/sizuoka/ogusi.htm 小梳神社] - お祭り三昧[https://genbu.net/data/suruga/ogusi_title.htm 小梳神社] - 玄松子。 少将井宮（しょうしょういのみや）とも呼ばれ、{{jalink|今川家}}にも崇敬された[https://www.visit-shizuoka.com/t/oogosho400/study/07_05.htm 紺屋町と少将井社〔小梳神社〕と代官屋敷] - するが企画観光局。 幼少期の{{jalink|徳川家康|Q171977}}（竹千代）が武運長久を祈願した神社としても知られ、かつては{{jalink|駿府城|Q1038629}}三ノ丸の城代屋敷（現・静岡市歴史博物館、旧・青葉小学校）に鎮座していたが、江戸時代の駿府城拡張に伴って、新谷町（現・御幸町〜伝馬町）を経た後、現在地（紺屋町）に遷座された[https://www.visit-shizuoka.com/spots/detail.php?kanko=543#:~:text=%E5%BE%B3%E5%B7%9D%E5%AE%B6%E5%BA%B7%E3%81%AE%E5%B9%BC%E5%B0%91%E6%9C%9F,%E5%BA%87%E8%AD%B7%E3%82%92%E5%8F%97%E3%81%91%E3%81%BE%E3%81%97%E3%81%9F%25E3%2580%2582 小梳神社] - するが企画観光局[http://www.ieyasu-net.com/shiseki/shizuoka/07shizuokashi/0002.html 小梳神社] - 全国家康公ネットワーク。 {{jalink|明治|Q3125096}}40年（{{jalink|1907年|Q2048}}）に{{jalink|県社}}に列格。 === 祭神 === * {{jalink|建速須佐之男命}} * {{jalink|奇稲田姫命}} === 脚注 === {{Reflist}} === 外部リンク === * [http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4406004 小梳神社] - 静岡県神社庁 {{DEFAULTSORT:おくししんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages]] [[Category:Autogenerated pages with jawiki interwikis, possibly accidentally overwritten]] [[Category:Shikinaisha]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Suruga Province]] [[Category:静岡県の旧県社]] [[Category:駿河区の建築物]] [[Category:駿河区の歴史]] [[Category:駿河国の式内社]] [[Category:祇園神社]]

street address (P6375) == * {'text': '静岡県静岡市葵区紺屋町', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:小梳神社]] {{wikidata link|Q134930718}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = 小梳神社 |画像 = [[File:小梳神社 - panoramio.jpg|250px]]
鳥居と拝殿 |所在地 = {{jalink|静岡県|Q131320}}{{jalink|静岡市|Q174691}}{{jalink|葵区|Q1131483}}紺屋町7-13 |位置 = {{coord|34|58|24.8|N|138|23|10.8|E|region:JP-22_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{jalink|建速須佐之男命}}、{{jalink|奇稲田姫命}} |神体 = |社格 = {{jalink|式内社}}、旧{{jalink|県社}} |創建 = |宮司 = |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = 7月27日 |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shizuoka|label=小梳神社|coordinates= {{coord2|34|58|24.8|N|138|23|10.8|E}}|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=12|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|coord={{coord|34|58|24.8|N|138|23|10.8|E}}}} }} '''小梳神社'''（おぐしじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|静岡県|Q131320}}{{jalink|静岡市|Q174691}}{{jalink|葵区|Q1131483}}紺屋町（こうやまち）にある神社[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4406004 小梳神社] - 静岡県神社庁。 === 概要 === JR{{jalink|静岡駅|Q801440}}北口の北西至近、呉服町通り沿いの北側に鎮座している。 創建は不詳だが、同名の{{jalink|式内社}}に比定されている古社である[https://humizuki.com/omaturi_zanmai/sight/jinja/sizuoka/ogusi.htm 小梳神社] - お祭り三昧[https://genbu.net/data/suruga/ogusi_title.htm 小梳神社] - 玄松子。 少将井宮（しょうしょういのみや）とも呼ばれ、{{jalink|今川家}}にも崇敬された[https://www.visit-shizuoka.com/t/oogosho400/study/07_05.htm 紺屋町と少将井社〔小梳神社〕と代官屋敷] - するが企画観光局。 幼少期の{{jalink|徳川家康|Q171977}}（竹千代）が武運長久を祈願した神社としても知られ、かつては{{jalink|駿府城|Q1038629}}三ノ丸の城代屋敷（現・静岡市歴史博物館、旧・青葉小学校）に鎮座していたが、江戸時代の駿府城拡張に伴って、新谷町（現・御幸町〜伝馬町）を経た後、現在地（紺屋町）に遷座された[https://www.visit-shizuoka.com/spots/detail.php?kanko=543#:~:text=%E5%BE%B3%E5%B7%9D%E5%AE%B6%E5%BA%B7%E3%81%AE%E5%B9%BC%E5%B0%91%E6%9C%9F,%E5%BA%87%E8%AD%B7%E3%82%92%E5%8F%97%E3%81%91%E3%81%BE%E3%81%97%E3%81%9F%25E3%2580%2582 小梳神社] - するが企画観光局[http://www.ieyasu-net.com/shiseki/shizuoka/07shizuokashi/0002.html 小梳神社] - 全国家康公ネットワーク。 {{jalink|明治|Q3125096}}40年（{{jalink|1907年|Q2048}}）に{{jalink|県社}}に列格。 === 祭神 === * {{jalink|建速須佐之男命}} * {{jalink|奇稲田姫命}} === 脚注 === {{Reflist}} === 外部リンク === * [http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4406004 小梳神社] - 静岡県神社庁 {{DEFAULTSORT:おくししんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages]] [[Category:Autogenerated pages with jawiki interwikis, possibly accidentally overwritten]] [[Category:Shikinaisha]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Suruga Province]] [[Category:静岡県の旧県社]] [[Category:駿河区の建築物]] [[Category:駿河区の歴史]] [[Category:駿河国の式内社]] [[Category:祇園神社]] [[Category:pages]]

street address (P6375) == * {'text': '静岡県静岡市葵区紺屋町', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:小梳神社]] {{wikidata link|Q134930718}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = 小梳神社 |画像 = [[File:小梳神社 - panoramio.jpg|250px]]
鳥居と拝殿 |所在地 = {{jalink|静岡県|Q131320}}{{jalink|静岡市|Q174691}}{{jalink|葵区|Q1131483}}紺屋町7-13 |位置 = {{coord|34|58|24.8|N|138|23|10.8|E|region:JP-22_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{jalink|建速須佐之男命}}、{{jalink|奇稲田姫命}} |神体 = |社格 = {{jalink|式内社}}、旧{{jalink|県社}} |創建 = |宮司 = |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = 7月27日 |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shizuoka|label=小梳神社|coordinates= {{coord2|34|58|24.8|N|138|23|10.8|E}}|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=12|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|coord={{coord|34|58|24.8|N|138|23|10.8|E}}}} }} '''小梳神社'''（おぐしじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|静岡県|Q131320}}{{jalink|静岡市|Q174691}}{{jalink|葵区|Q1131483}}紺屋町（こうやまち）にある神社[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4406004 小梳神社] - 静岡県神社庁。 === 概要 === JR{{jalink|静岡駅|Q801440}}北口の北西至近、呉服町通り沿いの北側に鎮座している。 創建は不詳だが、同名の{{jalink|式内社}}に比定されている古社である[https://humizuki.com/omaturi_zanmai/sight/jinja/sizuoka/ogusi.htm 小梳神社] - お祭り三昧[https://genbu.net/data/suruga/ogusi_title.htm 小梳神社] - 玄松子。 少将井宮（しょうしょういのみや）とも呼ばれ、{{jalink|今川家}}にも崇敬された[https://www.visit-shizuoka.com/t/oogosho400/study/07_05.htm 紺屋町と少将井社〔小梳神社〕と代官屋敷] - するが企画観光局。 幼少期の{{jalink|徳川家康|Q171977}}（竹千代）が武運長久を祈願した神社としても知られ、かつては{{jalink|駿府城|Q1038629}}三ノ丸の城代屋敷（現・静岡市歴史博物館、旧・青葉小学校）に鎮座していたが、江戸時代の駿府城拡張に伴って、新谷町（現・御幸町〜伝馬町）を経た後、現在地（紺屋町）に遷座された[https://www.visit-shizuoka.com/spots/detail.php?kanko=543#:~:text=%E5%BE%B3%E5%B7%9D%E5%AE%B6%E5%BA%B7%E3%81%AE%E5%B9%BC%E5%B0%91%E6%9C%9F,%E5%BA%87%E8%AD%B7%E3%82%92%E5%8F%97%E3%81%91%E3%81%BE%E3%81%97%E3%81%9F%25E3%2580%2582 小梳神社] - するが企画観光局[http://www.ieyasu-net.com/shiseki/shizuoka/07shizuokashi/0002.html 小梳神社] - 全国家康公ネットワーク。 {{jalink|明治|Q3125096}}40年（{{jalink|1907年|Q2048}}）に{{jalink|県社}}に列格。 === 祭神 === * {{jalink|建速須佐之男命}} * {{jalink|奇稲田姫命}} === 脚注 === {{Reflist}} === 外部リンク === * [http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4406004 小梳神社] - 静岡県神社庁 {{DEFAULTSORT:おくししんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages]] [[Category:Autogenerated pages with jawiki interwikis, possibly accidentally overwritten]] [[Category:Shikinaisha]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Suruga Province]] [[Category:静岡県の旧県社]] [[Category:駿河区の建築物]] [[Category:駿河区の歴史]] [[Category:駿河国の式内社]] [[Category:祇園神社]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:need translation]]

street address (P6375) == * {'text': '静岡県静岡市葵区紺屋町', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:小梳神社]] {{wikidata link|Q134930718}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = 小梳神社 |画像 = [[File:小梳神社 - panoramio.jpg|250px]]
鳥居と拝殿 |所在地 = {{jalink|静岡県|Q131320}}{{jalink|静岡市|Q174691}}{{jalink|葵区|Q1131483}}紺屋町7-13 |位置 = {{coord|34|58|24.8|N|138|23|10.8|E|region:JP-22_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{jalink|建速須佐之男命}}、{{jalink|奇稲田姫命}} |神体 = |社格 = {{jalink|式内社}}、旧{{jalink|県社}} |創建 = |宮司 = |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = 7月27日 |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shizuoka|label=小梳神社|coordinates= {{coord2|34|58|24.8|N|138|23|10.8|E}}|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=12|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|coord={{coord|34|58|24.8|N|138|23|10.8|E}}}} }} '''小梳神社'''（おぐしじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|静岡県|Q131320}}{{jalink|静岡市|Q174691}}{{jalink|葵区|Q1131483}}紺屋町（こうやまち）にある神社[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4406004 小梳神社] - 静岡県神社庁。 === 概要 === JR{{jalink|静岡駅|Q801440}}北口の北西至近、呉服町通り沿いの北側に鎮座している。 創建は不詳だが、同名の{{jalink|式内社}}に比定されている古社である[https://humizuki.com/omaturi_zanmai/sight/jinja/sizuoka/ogusi.htm 小梳神社] - お祭り三昧[https://genbu.net/data/suruga/ogusi_title.htm 小梳神社] - 玄松子。 少将井宮（しょうしょういのみや）とも呼ばれ、{{jalink|今川家}}にも崇敬された[https://www.visit-shizuoka.com/t/oogosho400/study/07_05.htm 紺屋町と少将井社〔小梳神社〕と代官屋敷] - するが企画観光局。 幼少期の{{jalink|徳川家康|Q171977}}（竹千代）が武運長久を祈願した神社としても知られ、かつては{{jalink|駿府城|Q1038629}}三ノ丸の城代屋敷（現・静岡市歴史博物館、旧・青葉小学校）に鎮座していたが、江戸時代の駿府城拡張に伴って、新谷町（現・御幸町〜伝馬町）を経た後、現在地（紺屋町）に遷座された[https://www.visit-shizuoka.com/spots/detail.php?kanko=543#:~:text=%E5%BE%B3%E5%B7%9D%E5%AE%B6%E5%BA%B7%E3%81%AE%E5%B9%BC%E5%B0%91%E6%9C%9F,%E5%BA%87%E8%AD%B7%E3%82%92%E5%8F%97%E3%81%91%E3%81%BE%E3%81%97%E3%81%9F%25E3%2580%2582 小梳神社] - するが企画観光局[http://www.ieyasu-net.com/shiseki/shizuoka/07shizuokashi/0002.html 小梳神社] - 全国家康公ネットワーク。 {{jalink|明治|Q3125096}}40年（{{jalink|1907年|Q2048}}）に{{jalink|県社}}に列格。 === 祭神 === * {{jalink|建速須佐之男命}} * {{jalink|奇稲田姫命}} === 脚注 === {{Reflist}} === 外部リンク === * [http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4406004 小梳神社] - 静岡県神社庁 {{DEFAULTSORT:おくししんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages]] [[Category:Shikinaisha]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Suruga Province]] [[Category:静岡県の旧県社]] [[Category:駿河区の建築物]] [[Category:駿河区の歴史]] [[Category:駿河国の式内社]] [[Category:祇園神社]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:need translation]]

鳥居と拝殿 |所在地 = {{jalink|静岡県|Q131320}}{{jalink|静岡市|Q174691}}{{jalink|葵区|Q1131483}}紺屋町7-13 |位置 = {{coord|34|58|24.8|N|138|23|10.8|E|region:JP-22_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{jalink|建速須佐之男命}}、{{jalink|奇稲田姫命}} |神体 = |社格 = {{jalink|式内社}}、旧{{jalink|県社}} |創建 = |宮司 = |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = 7月27日 |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shizuoka|label=小梳神社|coordinates= {{coord2|34|58|24.8|N|138|23|10.8|E}}|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=12|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|coord={{coord|34|58|24.8|N|138|23|10.8|E}}}} }} '''小梳神社'''（おぐしじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|静岡県|Q131320}}{{jalink|静岡市|Q174691}}{{jalink|葵区|Q1131483}}紺屋町（こうやまち）にある神社[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4406004 小梳神社] - 静岡県神社庁。 === 概要 === JR{{jalink|静岡駅|Q801440}}北口の北西至近、呉服町通り沿いの北側に鎮座している。 創建は不詳だが、同名の{{jalink|式内社}}に比定されている古社である[https://humizuki.com/omaturi_zanmai/sight/jinja/sizuoka/ogusi.htm 小梳神社] - お祭り三昧[https://genbu.net/data/suruga/ogusi_title.htm 小梳神社] - 玄松子。 少将井宮（しょうしょういのみや）とも呼ばれ、{{jalink|今川家}}にも崇敬された[https://www.visit-shizuoka.com/t/oogosho400/study/07_05.htm 紺屋町と少将井社〔小梳神社〕と代官屋敷] - するが企画観光局。 幼少期の{{jalink|徳川家康|Q171977}}（竹千代）が武運長久を祈願した神社としても知られ、かつては{{jalink|駿府城|Q1038629}}三ノ丸の城代屋敷（現・静岡市歴史博物館、旧・青葉小学校）に鎮座していたが、江戸時代の駿府城拡張に伴って、新谷町（現・御幸町〜伝馬町）を経た後、現在地（紺屋町）に遷座された[https://www.visit-shizuoka.com/spots/detail.php?kanko=543#:~:text=%E5%BE%B3%E5%B7%9D%E5%AE%B6%E5%BA%B7%E3%81%AE%E5%B9%BC%E5%B0%91%E6%9C%9F,%E5%BA%87%E8%AD%B7%E3%82%92%E5%8F%97%E3%81%91%E3%81%BE%E3%81%97%E3%81%9F%25E3%2580%2582 小梳神社] - するが企画観光局[http://www.ieyasu-net.com/shiseki/shizuoka/07shizuokashi/0002.html 小梳神社] - 全国家康公ネットワーク。 {{jalink|明治|Q3125096}}40年（{{jalink|1907年|Q2048}}）に{{jalink|県社}}に列格。 === 祭神 === * {{jalink|建速須佐之男命}} * {{jalink|奇稲田姫命}} === 脚注 === {{Reflist}} === 外部リンク === * [http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4406004 小梳神社] - 静岡県神社庁 {{DEFAULTSORT:おくししんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Ogushi Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Suruga Province]] [[Category:静岡県の旧県社]] [[Category:駿河区の建築物]] [[Category:駿河区の歴史]] [[Category:駿河国の式内社]] [[Category:祇園神社]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:need translation]]

street address (P6375) == * {'text': '静岡県静岡市葵区紺屋町', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:小梳神社]] {{wikidata link|Q134930718}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = 小梳神社 |画像 = [[File:小梳神社 - panoramio.jpg|250px]]
鳥居と拝殿 |所在地 = {{jalink|静岡県|Q131320}}{{jalink|静岡市|Q174691}}{{jalink|葵区|Q1131483}}紺屋町7-13 |位置 = {{coord|34|58|24.8|N|138|23|10.8|E|region:JP-22_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{jalink|建速須佐之男命}}、{{jalink|奇稲田姫命}} |神体 = |社格 = {{jalink|式内社}}、旧{{jalink|県社}} |創建 = |宮司 = |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = 7月27日 |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shizuoka|label=小梳神社|coordinates= {{coord2|34|58|24.8|N|138|23|10.8|E}}|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=12|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|coord={{coord|34|58|24.8|N|138|23|10.8|E}}}} }} '''小梳神社'''（おぐしじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|静岡県|Q131320}}{{jalink|静岡市|Q174691}}{{jalink|葵区|Q1131483}}紺屋町（こうやまち）にある神社[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4406004 小梳神社] - 静岡県神社庁。 === 概要 === JR{{jalink|静岡駅|Q801440}}北口の北西至近、呉服町通り沿いの北側に鎮座している。 創建は不詳だが、同名の{{jalink|式内社}}に比定されている古社である[https://humizuki.com/omaturi_zanmai/sight/jinja/sizuoka/ogusi.htm 小梳神社] - お祭り三昧[https://genbu.net/data/suruga/ogusi_title.htm 小梳神社] - 玄松子。 少将井宮（しょうしょういのみや）とも呼ばれ、{{jalink|今川家}}にも崇敬された[https://www.visit-shizuoka.com/t/oogosho400/study/07_05.htm 紺屋町と少将井社〔小梳神社〕と代官屋敷] - するが企画観光局。 幼少期の{{jalink|徳川家康|Q171977}}（竹千代）が武運長久を祈願した神社としても知られ、かつては{{jalink|駿府城|Q1038629}}三ノ丸の城代屋敷（現・静岡市歴史博物館、旧・青葉小学校）に鎮座していたが、江戸時代の駿府城拡張に伴って、新谷町（現・御幸町〜伝馬町）を経た後、現在地（紺屋町）に遷座された[https://www.visit-shizuoka.com/spots/detail.php?kanko=543#:~:text=%E5%BE%B3%E5%B7%9D%E5%AE%B6%E5%BA%B7%E3%81%AE%E5%B9%BC%E5%B0%91%E6%9C%9F,%E5%BA%87%E8%AD%B7%E3%82%92%E5%8F%97%E3%81%91%E3%81%BE%E3%81%97%E3%81%9F%25E3%2580%2582 小梳神社] - するが企画観光局[http://www.ieyasu-net.com/shiseki/shizuoka/07shizuokashi/0002.html 小梳神社] - 全国家康公ネットワーク。 {{jalink|明治|Q3125096}}40年（{{jalink|1907年|Q2048}}）に{{jalink|県社}}に列格。 === 祭神 === * {{jalink|建速須佐之男命}} * {{jalink|奇稲田姫命}} === 脚注 === {{Reflist}} === 外部リンク === * [http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4406004 小梳神社] - street address (P6375) == * {'text': '静岡県静岡市葵区紺屋町', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:小梳神社]] {{wikidata link|Q134930718}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = Ogushi Shrine |画像 = [[File:小梳神社 - panoramio.jpg|250px]]
Torii and haiden |所在地 = {{jalink|Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320}}{{jalink|Shizuoka|Q174691}}{{jalink|Aoi-ku|Q1131483}} Kōya-machi 7-13 |位置 = {{coord|34|58|24.8|N|138|23|10.8|E|region:JP-22_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{jalink|Takehayasusanoo-no-Mikoto}}, {{jalink|Kushinadahime-no-Mikoto}} |神体 = |社格 = {{jalink|Shikinaisha}}, former {{jalink|prefectural shrine}} |創建 = |宮司 = |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = July 27 |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shizuoka|label=Ogushi Shrine|coordinates= {{coord2|34|58|24.8|N|138|23|10.8|E}}|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=12|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|coord={{coord|34|58|24.8|N|138|23|10.8|E}}}} }} '''Ogushi Shrine''' (おぐしじんじゃ) is a shrine in Kōya-machi, {{jalink|Aoi-ku|Q1131483}}, {{jalink|Shizuoka|Q174691}}, {{jalink|Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320}}[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4406004 小梳神社] - Shizuoka Prefecture Association of Shinto Shrines. === Overview === It is enshrined just northwest of the north exit of JR {{jalink|Shizuoka Station|Q801440}}, on the north side along Gofuku-chō-dōri. Its foundation is unknown, but it is an old shrine identified with a same-named {{jalink|Shikinaisha}}[https://humizuki.com/omaturi_zanmai/sight/jinja/sizuoka/ogusi.htm 小梳神社] - Omatsuri Zanmai[https://genbu.net/data/suruga/ogusi_title.htm 小梳神社] - Genshōshi. It is also called Shōshōinomiya and was revered by the {{jalink|Imagawa clan}}[https://www.visit-shizuoka.com/t/oogosho400/study/07_05.htm 紺屋町と少将井社〔小梳神社〕と代官屋敷] - Suruga Planning and Tourism Bureau. It is also known as a shrine where the young {{jalink|Tokugawa Ieyasu|Q171977}} (Takechiyo) prayed for lasting martial fortune. It once stood at the castle deputy’s residence in the third bailey of {{jalink|Sunpu Castle|Q1038629}} (present Shizuoka City History Museum, formerly Aoba Elementary School), but with expansion of Sunpu Castle in the Edo period it was moved via Araya-machi (present Miyuki-chō to Tenma-chō) to its current site (Kōya-machi)[https://www.visit-shizuoka.com/spots/detail.php?kanko=543#:~:text=%E5%BE%B3%E5%B7%9D%E5%AE%B6%E5%BA%B7%E3%81%AE%E5%B9%BC%E5%B0%91%E6%9C%9F,%E5%BA%87%E8%AD%B7%E3%82%92%E5%8F%97%E3%81%91%E3%81%BE%E3%81%97%E3%81%9F%25E3%2580%2582 小梳神社] - Suruga Planning and Tourism Bureau[http://www.ieyasu-net.com/shiseki/shizuoka/07shizuokashi/0002.html 小梳神社] - Nationwide Ieyasu Network. In {{jalink|Meiji|Q3125096}} 40 ({{jalink|1907|Q2048}}), it was ranked as a prefectural shrine. === Enshrined deities === * {{jalink|Takehayasusanoo-no-Mikoto}} * {{jalink|Kushinadahime-no-Mikoto}} === Notes === {{Reflist}} === External links === * [http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4406004 小梳神社] - Shizuoka Prefecture Association of Shinto Shrines {{DEFAULTSORT:おくししんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Ogushi Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Ogushi Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinaisha|Ogushi Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Suruga Province]] [[Category:静岡県の旧県社]] [[Category:駿河区の建築物]] [[Category:駿河区の歴史]] [[Category:駿河国の式内社]] [[Category:祇園神社]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:need translation]]

street address (P6375) == * {'text': '静岡県静岡市葵区紺屋町', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:小梳神社]] {{wikidata link|Q134930718}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = Ogushi Shrine |画像 = [[File:小梳神社 - panoramio.jpg|250px]]
Torii and haiden |所在地 = {{jalink|Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320}}{{jalink|Shizuoka|Q174691}}{{jalink|Aoi-ku|Q1131483}} Kōya-machi 7-13 |位置 = {{coord|34|58|24.8|N|138|23|10.8|E|region:JP-22_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{jalink|Takehayasusanoo-no-Mikoto}}, {{jalink|Kushinadahime-no-Mikoto}} |神体 = |社格 = {{jalink|Shikinaisha}}, former {{jalink|prefectural shrine}} |創建 = |宮司 = |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = July 27 |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shizuoka|label=Ogushi Shrine|coordinates= {{coord2|34|58|24.8|N|138|23|10.8|E}}|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=12|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|coord={{coord|34|58|24.8|N|138|23|10.8|E}}}} }} '''Ogushi Shrine''' (おぐしじんじゃ) is a shrine in Kōya-machi, {{jalink|Aoi-ku|Q1131483}}, {{jalink|Shizuoka|Q174691}}, {{jalink|Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320}}[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4406004 小梳神社] - Shizuoka Prefecture Association of Shinto Shrines. === Overview === It is enshrined just northwest of the north exit of JR {{jalink|Shizuoka Station|Q801440}}, on the north side along Gofuku-chō-dōri. Its foundation is unknown, but it is an old shrine identified with a same-named {{jalink|Shikinaisha}}[https://humizuki.com/omaturi_zanmai/sight/jinja/sizuoka/ogusi.htm 小梳神社] - Omatsuri Zanmai[https://genbu.net/data/suruga/ogusi_title.htm 小梳神社] - Genshōshi. It is also called Shōshōinomiya and was revered by the {{jalink|Imagawa clan}}[https://www.visit-shizuoka.com/t/oogosho400/study/07_05.htm 紺屋町と少将井社〔小梳神社〕と代官屋敷] - Suruga Planning and Tourism Bureau. It is also known as a shrine where the young {{jalink|Tokugawa Ieyasu|Q171977}} (Takechiyo) prayed for lasting martial fortune. It once stood at the castle deputy’s residence in the third bailey of {{jalink|Sunpu Castle|Q1038629}} (present Shizuoka City History Museum, formerly Aoba Elementary School), but with expansion of Sunpu Castle in the Edo period it was moved via Araya-machi (present Miyuki-chō to Tenma-chō) to its current site (Kōya-machi)[https://www.visit-shizuoka.com/spots/detail.php?kanko=543#:~:text=%E5%BE%B3%E5%B7%9D%E5%AE%B6%E5%BA%B7%E3%81%AE%E5%B9%BC%E5%B0%91%E6%9C%9F,%E5%BA%87%E8%AD%B7%E3%82%92%E5%8F%97%E3%81%91%E3%81%BE%E3%81%97%E3%81%9F%25E3%2580%2582 小梳神社] - Suruga Planning and Tourism Bureau[http://www.ieyasu-net.com/shiseki/shizuoka/07shizuokashi/0002.html 小梳神社] - Nationwide Ieyasu Network. In {{jalink|Meiji|Q3125096}} 40 ({{jalink|1907|Q2048}}), it was ranked as a prefectural shrine. === Enshrined deities === * {{jalink|Takehayasusanoo-no-Mikoto}} * {{jalink|Kushinadahime-no-Mikoto}} === Notes === {{Reflist}} === External links === * [http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4406004 小梳神社] - Shizuoka Prefecture Association of Shinto Shrines {{DEFAULTSORT:おくししんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Ogushi Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Ogushi Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinaisha|Ogushi Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Suruga Province]] [[Category:静岡県の旧県社]] [[Category:駿河区の建築物]] [[Category:駿河区の歴史]] [[Category:駿河国の式内社]] [[Category:祇園神社]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:need translation]]

street address (P6375) == * {'text': '静岡県静岡市葵区紺屋町', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:小梳神社]] {{wikidata link|Q134930718}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = Ogushi Shrine |画像 = [[File:小梳神社 - panoramio.jpg|250px]]
Torii and haiden |所在地 = {{jalink|Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320}}{{jalink|Shizuoka|Q174691}}{{jalink|Aoi-ku|Q1131483}} Kōya-machi 7-13 |位置 = {{coord|34|58|24.8|N|138|23|10.8|E|region:JP-22_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{jalink|Takehayasusanoo-no-Mikoto}}, {{jalink|Kushinadahime-no-Mikoto}} |神体 = |社格 = {{jalink|Shikinaisha}}, former {{jalink|prefectural shrine}} |創建 = |宮司 = |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = July 27 |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shizuoka|label=Ogushi Shrine|coordinates= {{coord2|34|58|24.8|N|138|23|10.8|E}}|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=12|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|coord={{coord|34|58|24.8|N|138|23|10.8|E}}}} }} '''Ogushi Shrine''' (おぐしじんじゃ) is a shrine in Kōya-machi, {{jalink|Aoi-ku|Q1131483}}, {{jalink|Shizuoka|Q174691}}, {{jalink|Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320}}[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4406004 小梳神社] - Shizuoka Prefecture Association of Shinto Shrines. === Overview === It is enshrined just northwest of the north exit of JR {{jalink|Shizuoka Station|Q801440}}, on the north side along Gofuku-chō-dōri. Its foundation is unknown, but it is an old shrine identified with a same-named {{jalink|Shikinaisha}}[https://humizuki.com/omaturi_zanmai/sight/jinja/sizuoka/ogusi.htm 小梳神社] - Omatsuri Zanmai[https://genbu.net/data/suruga/ogusi_title.htm 小梳神社] - Genshōshi. It is also called Shōshōinomiya and was revered by the {{jalink|Imagawa clan}}[https://www.visit-shizuoka.com/t/oogosho400/study/07_05.htm 紺屋町と少将井社〔小梳神社〕と代官屋敷] - Suruga Planning and Tourism Bureau. It is also known as a shrine where the young {{jalink|Tokugawa Ieyasu|Q171977}} (Takechiyo) prayed for lasting martial fortune. It once stood at the castle deputy’s residence in the third bailey of {{jalink|Sunpu Castle|Q1038629}} (present Shizuoka City History Museum, formerly Aoba Elementary School), but with expansion of Sunpu Castle in the Edo period it was moved via Araya-machi (present Miyuki-chō to Tenma-chō) to its current site (Kōya-machi)[https://www.visit-shizuoka.com/spots/detail.php?kanko=543#:~:text=%E5%BE%B3%E5%B7%9D%E5%AE%B6%E5%BA%B7%E3%81%AE%E5%B9%BC%E5%B0%91%E6%9C%9F,%E5%BA%87%E8%AD%B7%E3%82%92%E5%8F%97%E3%81%91%E3%81%BE%E3%81%97%E3%81%9F%25E3%2580%2582 小梳神社] - Suruga Planning and Tourism Bureau[http://www.ieyasu-net.com/shiseki/shizuoka/07shizuokashi/0002.html 小梳神社] - Nationwide Ieyasu Network. In {{jalink|Meiji|Q3125096}} 40 ({{jalink|1907|Q2048}}), it was ranked as a prefectural shrine. === Enshrined deities === * {{jalink|Takehayasusanoo-no-Mikoto}} * {{jalink|Kushinadahime-no-Mikoto}} === Notes === {{Reflist}} === External links === * [http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4406004 小梳神社] - Shizuoka Prefecture Association of Shinto Shrines {{DEFAULTSORT:おくししんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Ogushi Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Ogushi Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinaisha|Ogushi Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Suruga Province]] [[Category:静岡県の旧県社]] [[Category:駿河区の建築物]] [[Category:駿河区の歴史]] [[Category:駿河国の式内社]] [[Category:祇園神社]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:need translation]]

Ollama and DeepSeek were too bad to actually use. see categorization since some of them are very questionable, especially if there was a massive decrease in page size or the {{jawiki| template is minimal or absent on the page

street address (P6375) == * {'text': '静岡県静岡市葵区紺屋町', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:小梳神社]] {{wikidata link|Q134930718}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = Ogushi Shrine |画像 = [[File:小梳神社 - panoramio.jpg|250px]]
Torii and haiden |所在地 = {{jalink|Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320}}{{jalink|Shizuoka|Q174691}}{{jalink|Aoi-ku|Q1131483}} Kōya-machi 7-13 |位置 = {{coord|34|58|24.8|N|138|23|10.8|E|region:JP-22_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{jalink|Takehayasusanoo-no-Mikoto}}, {{jalink|Kushinadahime-no-Mikoto}} |神体 = |社格 = {{jalink|Shikinaisha}}, former {{jalink|prefectural shrine}} |創建 = |宮司 = |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = July 27 |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shizuoka|label=Ogushi Shrine|coordinates= {{coord2|34|58|24.8|N|138|23|10.8|E}}|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=12|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|coord={{coord|34|58|24.8|N|138|23|10.8|E}}}} }} '''Ogushi Shrine''' (おぐしじんじゃ) is a shrine in Kōya-machi, {{jalink|Aoi-ku|Q1131483}}, {{jalink|Shizuoka|Q174691}}, {{jalink|Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320}}[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4406004 小梳神社] - Shizuoka Prefecture Association of Shinto Shrines. === Overview === It is enshrined just northwest of the north exit of JR {{jalink|Shizuoka Station|Q801440}}, on the north side along Gofuku-chō-dōri. Its foundation is unknown, but it is an old shrine identified with a same-named {{jalink|Shikinaisha}}[https://humizuki.com/omaturi_zanmai/sight/jinja/sizuoka/ogusi.htm 小梳神社] - Omatsuri Zanmai[https://genbu.net/data/suruga/ogusi_title.htm 小梳神社] - Genshōshi. It is also called Shōshōinomiya and was revered by the {{jalink|Imagawa clan}}[https://www.visit-shizuoka.com/t/oogosho400/study/07_05.htm 紺屋町と少将井社〔小梳神社〕と代官屋敷] - Suruga Planning and Tourism Bureau. It is also known as a shrine where the young {{jalink|Tokugawa Ieyasu|Q171977}} (Takechiyo) prayed for lasting martial fortune. It once stood at the castle deputy’s residence in the third bailey of {{jalink|Sunpu Castle|Q1038629}} (present Shizuoka City History Museum, formerly Aoba Elementary School), but with expansion of Sunpu Castle in the Edo period it was moved via Araya-machi (present Miyuki-chō to Tenma-chō) to its current site (Kōya-machi)[https://www.visit-shizuoka.com/spots/detail.php?kanko=543#:~:text=%E5%BE%B3%E5%B7%9D%E5%AE%B6%E5%BA%B7%E3%81%AE%E5%B9%BC%E5%B0%91%E6%9C%9F,%E5%BA%87%E8%AD%B7%E3%82%92%E5%8F%97%E3%81%91%E3%81%BE%E3%81%97%E3%81%9F%25E3%2580%2582 小梳神社] - Suruga Planning and Tourism Bureau[http://www.ieyasu-net.com/shiseki/shizuoka/07shizuokashi/0002.html 小梳神社] - Nationwide Ieyasu Network. In {{jalink|Meiji|Q3125096}} 40 ({{jalink|1907|Q2048}}), it was ranked as a prefectural shrine. === Enshrined deities === * {{jalink|Takehayasusanoo-no-Mikoto}} * {{jalink|Kushinadahime-no-Mikoto}} === Notes === {{Reflist}} === External links === * [http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4406004 小梳神社] - Shizuoka Prefecture Association of Shinto Shrines {{DEFAULTSORT:おくししんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Ogushi Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Ogushi Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinaisha|Ogushi Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Suruga Province]] [[Category:静岡県の旧県社]] [[Category:駿河区の建築物]] [[Category:駿河区の歴史]] [[Category:駿河国の式内社]] [[Category:祇園神社]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:need translation]]

Ollama and DeepSeek were too bad to actually use. see categorization since some of them are very questionable, especially if there was a massive decrease in page size or the {{jawiki| template is minimal or absent on the page

Torii and haiden |所在地 = {{jalink|Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320}}{{jalink|Shizuoka|Q174691}}{{jalink|Aoi-ku|Q1131483}} Kōya-machi 7-13 |位置 = {{coord|34|58|24.8|N|138|23|10.8|E|region:JP-22_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{jalink|Takehayasusanoo-no-Mikoto}}, {{jalink|Kushinadahime-no-Mikoto}} |神体 = |社格 = {{jalink|Shikinaisha}}, former {{jalink|prefectural shrine}} |創建 = |宮司 = |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = July 27 |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shizuoka|label=Ogushi Shrine|coordinates= {{coord2|34|58|24.8|N|138|23|10.8|E}}|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=12|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|coord={{coord|34|58|24.8|N|138|23|10.8|E}}}} }} '''Ogushi Shrine''' (おぐしじんじゃ) is a shrine in Kōya-machi, {{jalink|Aoi-ku|Q1131483}}, {{jalink|Shizuoka|Q174691}}, {{jalink|Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320}}[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4406004 小梳神社] - Shizuoka Prefecture Association of Shinto Shrines. === Overview === It is enshrined just northwest of the north exit of JR {{jalink|Shizuoka Station|Q801440}}, on the north side along Gofuku-chō-dōri. Its foundation is unknown, but it is an old shrine identified with a same-named {{jalink|Shikinaisha}}[https://humizuki.com/omaturi_zanmai/sight/jinja/sizuoka/ogusi.htm 小梳神社] - Omatsuri Zanmai[https://genbu.net/data/suruga/ogusi_title.htm 小梳神社] - Genshōshi. It is also called Shōshōinomiya and was revered by the {{jalink|Imagawa clan}}[https://www.visit-shizuoka.com/t/oogosho400/study/07_05.htm 紺屋町と少将井社〔小梳神社〕と代官屋敷] - Suruga Planning and Tourism Bureau. It is also known as a shrine where the young {{jalink|Tokugawa Ieyasu|Q171977}} (Takechiyo) prayed for lasting martial fortune. It once stood at the castle deputy’s residence in the third bailey of {{jalink|Sunpu Castle|Q1038629}} (present Shizuoka City History Museum, formerly Aoba Elementary School), but with expansion of Sunpu Castle in the Edo period it was moved via Araya-machi (present Miyuki-chō to Tenma-chō) to its current site (Kōya-machi)[https://www.visit-shizuoka.com/spots/detail.php?kanko=543#:~:text=%E5%BE%B3%E5%B7%9D%E5%AE%B6%E5%BA%B7%E3%81%AE%E5%B9%BC%E5%B0%91%E6%9C%9F,%E5%BA%87%E8%AD%B7%E3%82%92%E5%8F%97%E3%81%91%E3%81%BE%E3%81%97%E3%81%9F%25E3%2580%2582 小梳神社] - Suruga Planning and Tourism Bureau[http://www.ieyasu-net.com/shiseki/shizuoka/07shizuokashi/0002.html 小梳神社] - Nationwide Ieyasu Network. In {{jalink|Meiji|Q3125096}} 40 ({{jalink|1907|Q2048}}), it was ranked as a prefectural shrine. === Enshrined deities === * {{jalink|Takehayasusanoo-no-Mikoto}} * {{jalink|Kushinadahime-no-Mikoto}} === Notes === {{Reflist}} === External links === * [http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4406004 小梳神社] - Shizuoka Prefecture Association of Shinto Shrines {{DEFAULTSORT:おくししんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Ogushi Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Ogushi Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinaisha|Ogushi Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Suruga Province]] [[Category:静岡県の旧県社]] [[Category:駿河区の建築物]] [[Category:駿河区の歴史]] [[Category:駿河国の式内社]] [[Category:祇園神社]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:need translation]]

street address (P6375) == * {'text': '静岡県静岡市葵区紺屋町', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:小梳神社]] {{wikidata link|Q134930718}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = Ogushi Shrine |画像 = [[File:小梳神社 - panoramio.jpg|250px]]
Torii and haiden |所在地 = {{jalink|Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320}}{{jalink|Shizuoka|Q174691}}{{jalink|Aoi-ku|Q1131483}} Kōya-machi 7-13 |位置 = {{coord|34|58|24.8|N|138|23|10.8|E|region:JP-22_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{jalink|Takehayasusanoo-no-Mikoto}}, {{jalink|Kushinadahime-no-Mikoto}} |神体 = |社格 = {{jalink|Shikinaisha}}, former {{jalink|prefectural shrine}} |創建 = |宮司 = |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = July 27 |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shizuoka|label=Ogushi Shrine|coordinates= {{coord2|34|58|24.8|N|138|23|10.8|E}}|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=12|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|coord={{coord|34|58|24.8|N|138|23|10.8|E}}}} }} '''Ogushi Shrine''' (おぐしじんじゃ) is a shrine in Kōya-machi, {{jalink|Aoi-ku|Q1131483}}, {{jalink|Shizuoka|Q174691}}, {{jalink|Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320}}[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4406004 小梳神社] - Shizuoka Prefecture Association of Shinto Shrines. === Overview === It is enshrined just northwest of the north exit of JR {{jalink|Shizuoka Station|Q801440}}, on the north side along Gofuku-chō-dōri. Its foundation is unknown, but it is an old shrine identified with a same-named {{jalink|Shikinaisha}}[https://humizuki.com/omaturi_zanmai/sight/jinja/sizuoka/ogusi.htm 小梳神社] - Omatsuri Zanmai[https://genbu.net/data/suruga/ogusi_title.htm 小梳神社] - Genshōshi. It is also called Shōshōinomiya and was revered by the {{jalink|Imagawa clan}}[https://www.visit-shizuoka.com/t/oogosho400/study/07_05.htm 紺屋町と少将井社〔小梳神社〕と代官屋敷] - Suruga Planning and Tourism Bureau. It is also known as a shrine where the young {{jalink|Tokugawa Ieyasu|Q171977}} (Takechiyo) prayed for lasting martial fortune. It once stood at the castle deputy’s residence in the third bailey of {{jalink|Sunpu Castle|Q1038629}} (present Shizuoka City History Museum, formerly Aoba Elementary School), but with expansion of Sunpu Castle in the Edo period it was moved via Araya-machi (present Miyuki-chō to Tenma-chō) to its current site (Kōya-machi)[https://www.visit-shizuoka.com/spots/detail.php?kanko=543#:~:text=%E5%BE%B3%E5%B7%9D%E5%AE%B6%E5%BA%B7%E3%81%AE%E5%B9%BC%E5%B0%91%E6%9C%9F,%E5%BA%87%E8%AD%B7%E3%82%92%E5%8F%97%E3%81%91%E3%81%BE%E3%81%97%E3%81%9F%25E3%2580%2582 小梳神社] - Suruga Planning and Tourism Bureau[http://www.ieyasu-net.com/shiseki/shizuoka/07shizuokashi/0002.html 小梳神社] - Nationwide Ieyasu Network. In {{jalink|Meiji|Q3125096}} 40 ({{jalink|1907|Q2048}}), it was ranked as a prefectural shrine. === Enshrined deities === * {{jalink|Takehayasusanoo-no-Mikoto}} * {{jalink|Kushinadahime-no-Mikoto}} === Notes === {{Reflist}} === External links === * [http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4406004 小梳神社] - Shizuoka Prefecture Association of Shinto Shrines {{DEFAULTSORT:おくししんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Ogushi Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Ogushi Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinaisha|Ogushi Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Suruga Province]] [[Category:静岡県の旧県社]] [[Category:駿河区の建築物]] [[Category:駿河区の歴史]] [[Category:駿河国の式内社]] [[Category:祇園神社]] [[Category:pages]]

street address (P6375) == * {'text': '静岡県静岡市葵区紺屋町', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:小梳神社]] {{wikidata link|Q134930718}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = Ogushi Shrine |画像 = [[File:小梳神社 - panoramio.jpg|250px]]
Torii and haiden |所在地 = {{jalink|Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320}}{{jalink|Shizuoka|Q174691}}{{jalink|Aoi-ku|Q1131483}} Kōya-machi 7-13 |位置 = {{coord|34|58|24.8|N|138|23|10.8|E|region:JP-22_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{jalink|Takehayasusanoo-no-Mikoto}}, {{jalink|Kushinadahime-no-Mikoto}} |神体 = |社格 = {{jalink|Shikinaisha}}, former {{jalink|prefectural shrine}} |創建 = |宮司 = |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = July 27 |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shizuoka|label=Ogushi Shrine|coordinates= {{coord2|34|58|24.8|N|138|23|10.8|E}}|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=12|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|coord={{coord|34|58|24.8|N|138|23|10.8|E}}}} }} '''Ogushi Shrine''' (おぐしじんじゃ) is a shrine in Kōya-machi, {{jalink|Aoi-ku|Q1131483}}, {{jalink|Shizuoka|Q174691}}, {{jalink|Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320}}[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4406004 小梳神社] - Shizuoka Prefecture Association of Shinto Shrines. === Overview === It is enshrined just northwest of the north exit of JR {{jalink|Shizuoka Station|Q801440}}, on the north side along Gofuku-chō-dōri. Its foundation is unknown, but it is an old shrine identified with a same-named {{jalink|Shikinaisha}}[https://humizuki.com/omaturi_zanmai/sight/jinja/sizuoka/ogusi.htm 小梳神社] - Omatsuri Zanmai[https://genbu.net/data/suruga/ogusi_title.htm 小梳神社] - Genshōshi. It is also called Shōshōinomiya and was revered by the {{jalink|Imagawa clan}}[https://www.visit-shizuoka.com/t/oogosho400/study/07_05.htm 紺屋町と少将井社〔小梳神社〕と代官屋敷] - Suruga Planning and Tourism Bureau. It is also known as a shrine where the young {{jalink|Tokugawa Ieyasu|Q171977}} (Takechiyo) prayed for lasting martial fortune. It once stood at the castle deputy’s residence in the third bailey of {{jalink|Sunpu Castle|Q1038629}} (present Shizuoka City History Museum, formerly Aoba Elementary School), but with expansion of Sunpu Castle in the Edo period it was moved via Araya-machi (present Miyuki-chō to Tenma-chō) to its current site (Kōya-machi)[https://www.visit-shizuoka.com/spots/detail.php?kanko=543#:~:text=%E5%BE%B3%E5%B7%9D%E5%AE%B6%E5%BA%B7%E3%81%AE%E5%B9%BC%E5%B0%91%E6%9C%9F,%E5%BA%87%E8%AD%B7%E3%82%92%E5%8F%97%E3%81%91%E3%81%BE%E3%81%97%E3%81%9F%25E3%2580%2582 小梳神社] - Suruga Planning and Tourism Bureau[http://www.ieyasu-net.com/shiseki/shizuoka/07shizuokashi/0002.html 小梳神社] - Nationwide Ieyasu Network. In {{jalink|Meiji|Q3125096}} 40 ({{jalink|1907|Q2048}}), it was ranked as a prefectural shrine. === Enshrined deities === * {{jalink|Takehayasusanoo-no-Mikoto}} * {{jalink|Kushinadahime-no-Mikoto}} === Notes === {{Reflist}} === External links === * [http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4406004 小梳神社] - Shizuoka Prefecture Association of Shinto Shrines {{DEFAULTSORT:おくししんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Ogushi Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Ogushi Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinaisha|Ogushi Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Suruga Province]] [[Category:静岡県の旧県社]] [[Category:駿河区の建築物]] [[Category:駿河区の歴史]] [[Category:駿河国の式内社]] [[Category:祇園神社]] [[Category:pages]][[Category:qq]]

street address (P6375) == * {'text': '静岡県静岡市葵区紺屋町', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:小梳神社]] {{wikidata link|Q134930718}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = Ogushi Shrine |画像 = [[File:小梳神社 - panoramio.jpg|250px]]
Torii and haiden |所在地 = {{jalink|Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320}}{{jalink|Shizuoka|Q174691}}{{jalink|Aoi-ku|Q1131483}} Kōya-machi 7-13 |位置 = {{coord|34|58|24.8|N|138|23|10.8|E|region:JP-22_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{jalink|Takehayasusanoo-no-Mikoto}}, {{jalink|Kushinadahime-no-Mikoto}} |神体 = |社格 = {{jalink|Shikinaisha}}, former {{jalink|prefectural shrine}} |創建 = |宮司 = |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = July 27 |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shizuoka|label=Ogushi Shrine|coordinates= {{coord2|34|58|24.8|N|138|23|10.8|E}}|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=12|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|coord={{coord|34|58|24.8|N|138|23|10.8|E}}}} }} '''Ogushi Shrine''' (おぐしじんじゃ) is a shrine in Kōya-machi, {{jalink|Aoi-ku|Q1131483}}, {{jalink|Shizuoka|Q174691}}, {{jalink|Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320}}[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4406004 小梳神社] - Shizuoka Prefecture Association of Shinto Shrines. === Overview === It is enshrined just northwest of the north exit of JR {{jalink|Shizuoka Station|Q801440}}, on the north side along Gofuku-chō-dōri. Its foundation is unknown, but it is an old shrine identified with a same-named {{jalink|Shikinaisha}}[https://humizuki.com/omaturi_zanmai/sight/jinja/sizuoka/ogusi.htm 小梳神社] - Omatsuri Zanmai[https://genbu.net/data/suruga/ogusi_title.htm 小梳神社] - Genshōshi. It is also called Shōshōinomiya and was revered by the {{jalink|Imagawa clan}}[https://www.visit-shizuoka.com/t/oogosho400/study/07_05.htm 紺屋町と少将井社〔小梳神社〕と代官屋敷] - Suruga Planning and Tourism Bureau. It is also known as a shrine where the young {{jalink|Tokugawa Ieyasu|Q171977}} (Takechiyo) prayed for lasting martial fortune. It once stood at the castle deputy’s residence in the third bailey of {{jalink|Sunpu Castle|Q1038629}} (present Shizuoka City History Museum, formerly Aoba Elementary School), but with expansion of Sunpu Castle in the Edo period it was moved via Araya-machi (present Miyuki-chō to Tenma-chō) to its current site (Kōya-machi)[https://www.visit-shizuoka.com/spots/detail.php?kanko=543#:~:text=%E5%BE%B3%E5%B7%9D%E5%AE%B6%E5%BA%B7%E3%81%AE%E5%B9%BC%E5%B0%91%E6%9C%9F,%E5%BA%87%E8%AD%B7%E3%82%92%E5%8F%97%E3%81%91%E3%81%BE%E3%81%97%E3%81%9F%25E3%2580%2582 小梳神社] - Suruga Planning and Tourism Bureau[http://www.ieyasu-net.com/shiseki/shizuoka/07shizuokashi/0002.html 小梳神社] - Nationwide Ieyasu Network. In {{jalink|Meiji|Q3125096}} 40 ({{jalink|1907|Q2048}}), it was ranked as a prefectural shrine. === Enshrined deities === * {{jalink|Takehayasusanoo-no-Mikoto}} * {{jalink|Kushinadahime-no-Mikoto}} === Notes === {{Reflist}} === External links === * [http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4406004 小梳神社] - Shizuoka Prefecture Association of Shinto Shrines {{DEFAULTSORT:おくししんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Ogushi Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Ogushi Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinaisha|Ogushi Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Suruga Province]] [[Category:静岡県の旧県社]] [[Category:駿河区の建築物]] [[Category:駿河区の歴史]] [[Category:駿河国の式内社]] [[Category:祇園神社]] [[Category:pages]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qqq]]

street address (P6375) == * {'text': '静岡県静岡市葵区紺屋町', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:小梳神社]] {{wikidata link|Q134930718}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = Ogushi Shrine |画像 = [[File:小梳神社 - panoramio.jpg|250px]]
Torii and haiden |所在地 = {{jalink|Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320}}{{jalink|Shizuoka|Q174691}}{{jalink|Aoi-ku|Q1131483}} Kōya-machi 7-13 |位置 = {{coord|34|58|24.8|N|138|23|10.8|E|region:JP-22_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{jalink|Takehayasusanoo-no-Mikoto}}, {{jalink|Kushinadahime-no-Mikoto}} |神体 = |社格 = {{jalink|Shikinaisha}}, former {{jalink|prefectural shrine}} |創建 = |宮司 = |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = July 27 |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shizuoka|label=Ogushi Shrine|coordinates= {{coord2|34|58|24.8|N|138|23|10.8|E}}|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=12|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|coord={{coord|34|58|24.8|N|138|23|10.8|E}}}} }} '''Ogushi Shrine''' (おぐしじんじゃ) is a shrine in Kōya-machi, {{jalink|Aoi-ku|Q1131483}}, {{jalink|Shizuoka|Q174691}}, {{jalink|Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320}}[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4406004 小梳神社] - Shizuoka Prefecture Association of Shinto Shrines. === Overview === It is enshrined just northwest of the north exit of JR {{jalink|Shizuoka Station|Q801440}}, on the north side along Gofuku-chō-dōri. Its foundation is unknown, but it is an old shrine identified with a same-named {{jalink|Shikinaisha}}[https://humizuki.com/omaturi_zanmai/sight/jinja/sizuoka/ogusi.htm 小梳神社] - Omatsuri Zanmai[https://genbu.net/data/suruga/ogusi_title.htm 小梳神社] - Genshōshi. It is also called Shōshōinomiya and was revered by the {{jalink|Imagawa clan}}[https://www.visit-shizuoka.com/t/oogosho400/study/07_05.htm 紺屋町と少将井社〔小梳神社〕と代官屋敷] - Suruga Planning and Tourism Bureau. It is also known as a shrine where the young {{jalink|Tokugawa Ieyasu|Q171977}} (Takechiyo) prayed for lasting martial fortune. It once stood at the castle deputy’s residence in the third bailey of {{jalink|Sunpu Castle|Q1038629}} (present Shizuoka City History Museum, formerly Aoba Elementary School), but with expansion of Sunpu Castle in the Edo period it was moved via Araya-machi (present Miyuki-chō to Tenma-chō) to its current site (Kōya-machi)[https://www.visit-shizuoka.com/spots/detail.php?kanko=543#:~:text=%E5%BE%B3%E5%B7%9D%E5%AE%B6%E5%BA%B7%E3%81%AE%E5%B9%BC%E5%B0%91%E6%9C%9F,%E5%BA%87%E8%AD%B7%E3%82%92%E5%8F%97%E3%81%91%E3%81%BE%E3%81%97%E3%81%9F%25E3%2580%2582 小梳神社] - Suruga Planning and Tourism Bureau[http://www.ieyasu-net.com/shiseki/shizuoka/07shizuokashi/0002.html 小梳神社] - Nationwide Ieyasu Network. In {{jalink|Meiji|Q3125096}} 40 ({{jalink|1907|Q2048}}), it was ranked as a prefectural shrine. === Enshrined deities === * {{jalink|Takehayasusanoo-no-Mikoto}} * {{jalink|Kushinadahime-no-Mikoto}} === Notes === {{Reflist}} === External links === * [http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4406004 小梳神社] - Shizuoka Prefecture Association of Shinto Shrines {{DEFAULTSORT:おくししんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Ogushi Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Ogushi Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinaisha|Ogushi Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Suruga Province]] [[Category:静岡県の旧県社]] [[Category:駿河区の建築物]] [[Category:駿河区の歴史]] [[Category:駿河国の式内社]] [[Category:祇園神社]] [[Category:pages]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qqq]] [[Category:qqqqqqq]]

Torii and haiden |所在地 = {{ill|lt=Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320|WD=Q131320}}{{ill|lt=Shizuoka|Q174691|WD=Q174691}}{{ill|lt=Aoi-ku|Q1131483|WD=Q1131483}} Kōya-machi 7-13 |位置 = {{coord|34|58|24.8|N|138|23|10.8|E|region:JP-22_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{ill||lt=Takehayasusanoo-no-Mikoto|UNKNOWN}}, {{ill||lt=Kushinadahime-no-Mikoto|UNKNOWN}} |神体 = |社格 = {{ill||lt=Shikinaisha|UNKNOWN}}, former {{ill||lt=prefectural shrine|UNKNOWN}} |創建 = |宮司 = |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = July 27 |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shizuoka|label=Ogushi Shrine|coordinates= {{coord2|34|58|24.8|N|138|23|10.8|E}}|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=12|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|coord={{coord|34|58|24.8|N|138|23|10.8|E}}}} }} '''Ogushi Shrine''' (おぐしじんじゃ) is a shrine in Kōya-machi, {{ill|lt=Aoi-ku|Q1131483|WD=Q1131483}}, {{ill|lt=Shizuoka|Q174691|WD=Q174691}}, {{ill|lt=Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320|WD=Q131320}}[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4406004 小梳神社] - Shizuoka Prefecture Association of Shinto Shrines. === Overview === It is enshrined just northwest of the north exit of JR {{ill|lt=Shizuoka Station|Q801440|WD=Q801440}}, on the north side along Gofuku-chō-dōri. Its foundation is unknown, but it is an old shrine identified with a same-named {{ill||lt=Shikinaisha|UNKNOWN}}[https://humizuki.com/omaturi_zanmai/sight/jinja/sizuoka/ogusi.htm 小梳神社] - Omatsuri Zanmai[https://genbu.net/data/suruga/ogusi_title.htm 小梳神社] - Genshōshi. It is also called Shōshōinomiya and was revered by the {{ill||lt=Imagawa clan|UNKNOWN}}[https://www.visit-shizuoka.com/t/oogosho400/study/07_05.htm 紺屋町と少将井社〔小梳神社〕と代官屋敷] - Suruga Planning and Tourism Bureau. It is also known as a shrine where the young {{ill|lt=Tokugawa Ieyasu|Q171977|WD=Q171977}} (Takechiyo) prayed for lasting martial fortune. It once stood at the castle deputy’s residence in the third bailey of {{ill|lt=Sunpu Castle|Q1038629|WD=Q1038629}} (present Shizuoka City History Museum, formerly Aoba Elementary School), but with expansion of Sunpu Castle in the Edo period it was moved via Araya-machi (present Miyuki-chō to Tenma-chō) to its current site (Kōya-machi)[https://www.visit-shizuoka.com/spots/detail.php?kanko=543#:~:text=%E5%BE%B3%E5%B7%9D%E5%AE%B6%E5%BA%B7%E3%81%AE%E5%B9%BC%E5%B0%91%E6%9C%9F,%E5%BA%87%E8%AD%B7%E3%82%92%E5%8F%97%E3%81%91%E3%81%BE%E3%81%97%E3%81%9F%25E3%2580%2582 小梳神社] - Suruga Planning and Tourism Bureau[http://www.ieyasu-net.com/shiseki/shizuoka/07shizuokashi/0002.html 小梳神社] - Nationwide Ieyasu Network. In {{ill|lt=Meiji|Q3125096|WD=Q3125096}} 40 ({{ill|lt=1907|Q2048|WD=Q2048}}), it was ranked as a prefectural shrine. === Enshrined deities === * {{ill||lt=Takehayasusanoo-no-Mikoto|UNKNOWN}} * {{ill||lt=Kushinadahime-no-Mikoto|UNKNOWN}} === Notes === {{Reflist}} === External links === * [http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4406004 小梳神社] - Shizuoka Prefecture Association of Shinto Shrines {{DEFAULTSORT:おくししんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Ogushi Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Ogushi Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinaisha|Ogushi Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Suruga Province]] [[Category:静岡県の旧県社]] [[Category:駿河区の建築物]] [[Category:駿河区の歴史]] [[Category:駿河国の式内社]] [[Category:祇園神社]] [[Category:pages]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qqq]] [[Category:qqqqqqq]]

street address (P6375) == * {'text': '静岡県静岡市葵区紺屋町', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:小梳神社]] {{wikidata link|Q134930718}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = Ogushi Shrine |画像 = [[File:小梳神社 - panoramio.jpg|250px]]
Torii and haiden |所在地 = {{ill|lt=Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320|WD=Q131320}}{{ill|lt=Shizuoka|Q174691|WD=Q174691}}{{ill|lt=Aoi-ku|Q1131483|WD=Q1131483}} Kōya-machi 7-13 |位置 = {{coord|34|58|24.8|N|138|23|10.8|E|region:JP-22_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Takehayasusanoo-no-Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}}, {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Kushinadahime-no-Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}} |神体 = |社格 = {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=UNKNOWN}}, former {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=prefectural shrine|1=UNKNOWN}} |創建 = |宮司 = |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = July 27 |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shizuoka|label=Ogushi Shrine|coordinates= {{coord2|34|58|24.8|N|138|23|10.8|E}}|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=12|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|coord={{coord|34|58|24.8|N|138|23|10.8|E}}}} }} '''Ogushi Shrine''' (おぐしじんじゃ) is a shrine in Kōya-machi, {{ill|lt=Aoi-ku|Q1131483|WD=Q1131483}}, {{ill|lt=Shizuoka|Q174691|WD=Q174691}}, {{ill|lt=Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320|WD=Q131320}}[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4406004 小梳神社] - Shizuoka Prefecture Association of Shinto Shrines. === Overview === It is enshrined just northwest of the north exit of JR {{ill|lt=Shizuoka Station|Q801440|WD=Q801440}}, on the north side along Gofuku-chō-dōri. Its foundation is unknown, but it is an old shrine identified with a same-named {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=UNKNOWN}}[https://humizuki.com/omaturi_zanmai/sight/jinja/sizuoka/ogusi.htm 小梳神社] - Omatsuri Zanmai[https://genbu.net/data/suruga/ogusi_title.htm 小梳神社] - Genshōshi. It is also called Shōshōinomiya and was revered by the {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Imagawa clan|1=UNKNOWN}}[https://www.visit-shizuoka.com/t/oogosho400/study/07_05.htm 紺屋町と少将井社〔小梳神社〕と代官屋敷] - Suruga Planning and Tourism Bureau. It is also known as a shrine where the young {{ill|lt=Tokugawa Ieyasu|Q171977|WD=Q171977}} (Takechiyo) prayed for lasting martial fortune. It once stood at the castle deputy’s residence in the third bailey of {{ill|lt=Sunpu Castle|Q1038629|WD=Q1038629}} (present Shizuoka City History Museum, formerly Aoba Elementary School), but with expansion of Sunpu Castle in the Edo period it was moved via Araya-machi (present Miyuki-chō to Tenma-chō) to its current site (Kōya-machi)[https://www.visit-shizuoka.com/spots/detail.php?kanko=543#:~:text=%E5%BE%B3%E5%B7%9D%E5%AE%B6%E5%BA%B7%E3%81%AE%E5%B9%BC%E5%B0%91%E6%9C%9F,%E5%BA%87%E8%AD%B7%E3%82%92%E5%8F%97%E3%81%91%E3%81%BE%E3%81%97%E3%81%9F%25E3%2580%2582 小梳神社] - Suruga Planning and Tourism Bureau[http://www.ieyasu-net.com/shiseki/shizuoka/07shizuokashi/0002.html 小梳神社] - Nationwide Ieyasu Network. In {{ill|lt=Meiji|Q3125096|WD=Q3125096}} 40 ({{ill|lt=1907|Q2048|WD=Q2048}}), it was ranked as a prefectural shrine. === Enshrined deities === * {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Takehayasusanoo-no-Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}} * {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Kushinadahime-no-Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}} === Notes === {{Reflist}} === External links === * [http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4406004 小梳神社] - Shizuoka Prefecture Association of Shinto Shrines {{DEFAULTSORT:おくししんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Ogushi Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Ogushi Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinaisha|Ogushi Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Suruga Province]] [[Category:静岡県の旧県社]] [[Category:駿河区の建築物]] [[Category:駿河区の歴史]] [[Category:駿河国の式内社]] [[Category:祇園神社]] [[Category:pages]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qqq]] [[Category:qqqqqqq]]

street address (P6375) == * {'text': '静岡県静岡市葵区紺屋町', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:小梳神社]] {{wikidata link|Q134930718}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = Ogushi Shrine |画像 = [[File:小梳神社 - panoramio.jpg|250px]]
Torii and haiden |所在地 = {{ill|lt=Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320|WD=Q131320}}{{ill|lt=Shizuoka|Q174691|WD=Q174691}}{{ill|lt=Aoi-ku|Q1131483|WD=Q1131483}} Kōya-machi 7-13 |位置 = {{coord|34|58|24.8|N|138|23|10.8|E|region:JP-22_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Takehayasusanoo-no-Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}}, {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Kushinadahime-no-Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}} |神体 = |社格 = {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=UNKNOWN|WD=Q134917286}}, former {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=prefectural shrine|1=UNKNOWN}} |創建 = |宮司 = |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = July 27 |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shizuoka|label=Ogushi Shrine|coordinates= {{coord2|34|58|24.8|N|138|23|10.8|E}}|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=12|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|coord={{coord|34|58|24.8|N|138|23|10.8|E}}}} }} '''Ogushi Shrine''' (おぐしじんじゃ) is a shrine in Kōya-machi, {{ill|lt=Aoi-ku|Q1131483|WD=Q1131483}}, {{ill|lt=Shizuoka|Q174691|WD=Q174691}}, {{ill|lt=Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320|WD=Q131320}}[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4406004 小梳神社] - Shizuoka Prefecture Association of Shinto Shrines. === Overview === It is enshrined just northwest of the north exit of JR {{ill|lt=Shizuoka Station|Q801440|WD=Q801440}}, on the north side along Gofuku-chō-dōri. Its foundation is unknown, but it is an old shrine identified with a same-named {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=UNKNOWN|WD=Q134917286}}[https://humizuki.com/omaturi_zanmai/sight/jinja/sizuoka/ogusi.htm 小梳神社] - Omatsuri Zanmai[https://genbu.net/data/suruga/ogusi_title.htm 小梳神社] - Genshōshi. It is also called Shōshōinomiya and was revered by the {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Imagawa clan|1=UNKNOWN}}[https://www.visit-shizuoka.com/t/oogosho400/study/07_05.htm 紺屋町と少将井社〔小梳神社〕と代官屋敷] - Suruga Planning and Tourism Bureau. It is also known as a shrine where the young {{ill|lt=Tokugawa Ieyasu|Q171977|WD=Q171977}} (Takechiyo) prayed for lasting martial fortune. It once stood at the castle deputy’s residence in the third bailey of {{ill|lt=Sunpu Castle|Q1038629|WD=Q1038629}} (present Shizuoka City History Museum, formerly Aoba Elementary School), but with expansion of Sunpu Castle in the Edo period it was moved via Araya-machi (present Miyuki-chō to Tenma-chō) to its current site (Kōya-machi)[https://www.visit-shizuoka.com/spots/detail.php?kanko=543#:~:text=%E5%BE%B3%E5%B7%9D%E5%AE%B6%E5%BA%B7%E3%81%AE%E5%B9%BC%E5%B0%91%E6%9C%9F,%E5%BA%87%E8%AD%B7%E3%82%92%E5%8F%97%E3%81%91%E3%81%BE%E3%81%97%E3%81%9F%25E3%2580%2582 小梳神社] - Suruga Planning and Tourism Bureau[http://www.ieyasu-net.com/shiseki/shizuoka/07shizuokashi/0002.html 小梳神社] - Nationwide Ieyasu Network. In {{ill|lt=Meiji|Q3125096|WD=Q3125096}} 40 ({{ill|lt=1907|Q2048|WD=Q2048}}), it was ranked as a prefectural shrine. === Enshrined deities === * {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Takehayasusanoo-no-Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}} * {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Kushinadahime-no-Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}} === Notes === {{Reflist}} === External links === * [http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4406004 小梳神社] - Shizuoka Prefecture Association of Shinto Shrines {{DEFAULTSORT:おくししんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Ogushi Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Ogushi Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinaisha|Ogushi Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Suruga Province]] [[Category:静岡県の旧県社]] [[Category:駿河区の建築物]] [[Category:駿河区の歴史]] [[Category:駿河国の式内社]] [[Category:祇園神社]] [[Category:pages]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qqq]] [[Category:qqqqqqq]]

street address (P6375) == * {'text': '静岡県静岡市葵区紺屋町', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:小梳神社]] {{wikidata link|Q134930718}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = Ogushi Shrine |画像 = [[File:小梳神社 - panoramio.jpg|250px]]
Torii and haiden |所在地 = {{ill|lt=Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320|WD=Q131320}}{{ill|lt=Shizuoka|Q174691|WD=Q174691}}{{ill|lt=Aoi-ku|Q1131483|WD=Q1131483}} Kōya-machi 7-13 |位置 = {{coord|34|58|24.8|N|138|23|10.8|E|region:JP-22_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Takehayasusanoo-no-Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}}, {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Kushinadahime-no-Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}} |神体 = |社格 = {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=UNKNOWN|WD=Q134917286}}, former {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=prefectural shrine|1=UNKNOWN|WD=Q90139226}} |創建 = |宮司 = |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = July 27 |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shizuoka|label=Ogushi Shrine|coordinates= {{coord2|34|58|24.8|N|138|23|10.8|E}}|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=12|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|coord={{coord|34|58|24.8|N|138|23|10.8|E}}}} }} '''Ogushi Shrine''' (おぐしじんじゃ) is a shrine in Kōya-machi, {{ill|lt=Aoi-ku|Q1131483|WD=Q1131483}}, {{ill|lt=Shizuoka|Q174691|WD=Q174691}}, {{ill|lt=Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320|WD=Q131320}}[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4406004 小梳神社] - Shizuoka Prefecture Association of Shinto Shrines. === Overview === It is enshrined just northwest of the north exit of JR {{ill|lt=Shizuoka Station|Q801440|WD=Q801440}}, on the north side along Gofuku-chō-dōri. Its foundation is unknown, but it is an old shrine identified with a same-named {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=UNKNOWN|WD=Q134917286}}[https://humizuki.com/omaturi_zanmai/sight/jinja/sizuoka/ogusi.htm 小梳神社] - Omatsuri Zanmai[https://genbu.net/data/suruga/ogusi_title.htm 小梳神社] - Genshōshi. It is also called Shōshōinomiya and was revered by the {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Imagawa clan|1=UNKNOWN}}[https://www.visit-shizuoka.com/t/oogosho400/study/07_05.htm 紺屋町と少将井社〔小梳神社〕と代官屋敷] - Suruga Planning and Tourism Bureau. It is also known as a shrine where the young {{ill|lt=Tokugawa Ieyasu|Q171977|WD=Q171977}} (Takechiyo) prayed for lasting martial fortune. It once stood at the castle deputy’s residence in the third bailey of {{ill|lt=Sunpu Castle|Q1038629|WD=Q1038629}} (present Shizuoka City History Museum, formerly Aoba Elementary School), but with expansion of Sunpu Castle in the Edo period it was moved via Araya-machi (present Miyuki-chō to Tenma-chō) to its current site (Kōya-machi)[https://www.visit-shizuoka.com/spots/detail.php?kanko=543#:~:text=%E5%BE%B3%E5%B7%9D%E5%AE%B6%E5%BA%B7%E3%81%AE%E5%B9%BC%E5%B0%91%E6%9C%9F,%E5%BA%87%E8%AD%B7%E3%82%92%E5%8F%97%E3%81%91%E3%81%BE%E3%81%97%E3%81%9F%25E3%2580%2582 小梳神社] - Suruga Planning and Tourism Bureau[http://www.ieyasu-net.com/shiseki/shizuoka/07shizuokashi/0002.html 小梳神社] - Nationwide Ieyasu Network. In {{ill|lt=Meiji|Q3125096|WD=Q3125096}} 40 ({{ill|lt=1907|Q2048|WD=Q2048}}), it was ranked as a prefectural shrine. === Enshrined deities === * {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Takehayasusanoo-no-Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}} * {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Kushinadahime-no-Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}} === Notes === {{Reflist}} === External links === * [http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4406004 小梳神社] - Shizuoka Prefecture Association of Shinto Shrines {{DEFAULTSORT:おくししんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Ogushi Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Ogushi Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinaisha|Ogushi Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Suruga Province]] [[Category:静岡県の旧県社]] [[Category:駿河区の建築物]] [[Category:駿河区の歴史]] [[Category:駿河国の式内社]] [[Category:祇園神社]] [[Category:pages]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qqq]] [[Category:qqqqqqq]]

street address (P6375) == * {'text': '静岡県静岡市葵区紺屋町', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:小梳神社]] {{wikidata link|Q134930718}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = Ogushi Shrine |画像 = [[File:小梳神社 - panoramio.jpg|250px]]
Torii and haiden |所在地 = {{ill|lt=Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320|WD=Q131320}}{{ill|lt=Shizuoka|Q174691|WD=Q174691}}{{ill|lt=Aoi-ku|Q1131483|WD=Q1131483}} Kōya-machi 7-13 |位置 = {{coord|34|58|24.8|N|138|23|10.8|E|region:JP-22_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Takehayasusanoo-no-Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}}, {{ill|UNKNOWN|WD=Q505469|lt=Kushinadahime-no-Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}} |神体 = |社格 = {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=UNKNOWN|WD=Q134917286}}, former {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=prefectural shrine|1=UNKNOWN|WD=Q90139226}} |創建 = |宮司 = |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = July 27 |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shizuoka|label=Ogushi Shrine|coordinates= {{coord2|34|58|24.8|N|138|23|10.8|E}}|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=12|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|coord={{coord|34|58|24.8|N|138|23|10.8|E}}}} }} '''Ogushi Shrine''' (おぐしじんじゃ) is a shrine in Kōya-machi, {{ill|lt=Aoi-ku|Q1131483|WD=Q1131483}}, {{ill|lt=Shizuoka|Q174691|WD=Q174691}}, {{ill|lt=Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320|WD=Q131320}}[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4406004 小梳神社] - Shizuoka Prefecture Association of Shinto Shrines. === Overview === It is enshrined just northwest of the north exit of JR {{ill|lt=Shizuoka Station|Q801440|WD=Q801440}}, on the north side along Gofuku-chō-dōri. Its foundation is unknown, but it is an old shrine identified with a same-named {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=UNKNOWN|WD=Q134917286}}[https://humizuki.com/omaturi_zanmai/sight/jinja/sizuoka/ogusi.htm 小梳神社] - Omatsuri Zanmai[https://genbu.net/data/suruga/ogusi_title.htm 小梳神社] - Genshōshi. It is also called Shōshōinomiya and was revered by the {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Imagawa clan|1=UNKNOWN}}[https://www.visit-shizuoka.com/t/oogosho400/study/07_05.htm 紺屋町と少将井社〔小梳神社〕と代官屋敷] - Suruga Planning and Tourism Bureau. It is also known as a shrine where the young {{ill|lt=Tokugawa Ieyasu|Q171977|WD=Q171977}} (Takechiyo) prayed for lasting martial fortune. It once stood at the castle deputy’s residence in the third bailey of {{ill|lt=Sunpu Castle|Q1038629|WD=Q1038629}} (present Shizuoka City History Museum, formerly Aoba Elementary School), but with expansion of Sunpu Castle in the Edo period it was moved via Araya-machi (present Miyuki-chō to Tenma-chō) to its current site (Kōya-machi)[https://www.visit-shizuoka.com/spots/detail.php?kanko=543#:~:text=%E5%BE%B3%E5%B7%9D%E5%AE%B6%E5%BA%B7%E3%81%AE%E5%B9%BC%E5%B0%91%E6%9C%9F,%E5%BA%87%E8%AD%B7%E3%82%92%E5%8F%97%E3%81%91%E3%81%BE%E3%81%97%E3%81%9F%25E3%2580%2582 小梳神社] - Suruga Planning and Tourism Bureau[http://www.ieyasu-net.com/shiseki/shizuoka/07shizuokashi/0002.html 小梳神社] - Nationwide Ieyasu Network. In {{ill|lt=Meiji|Q3125096|WD=Q3125096}} 40 ({{ill|lt=1907|Q2048|WD=Q2048}}), it was ranked as a prefectural shrine. === Enshrined deities === * {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Takehayasusanoo-no-Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}} * {{ill|UNKNOWN|WD=Q505469|lt=Kushinadahime-no-Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}} === Notes === {{Reflist}} === External links === * [http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4406004 小梳神社] - Shizuoka Prefecture Association of Shinto Shrines {{DEFAULTSORT:おくししんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Ogushi Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Ogushi Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinaisha|Ogushi Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Suruga Province]] [[Category:静岡県の旧県社]] [[Category:駿河区の建築物]] [[Category:駿河区の歴史]] [[Category:駿河国の式内社]] [[Category:祇園神社]] [[Category:pages]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qqq]] [[Category:qqqqqqq]]
